CustomField.formula: IF( ISBLANK( Interview_Name__c), "", SUBSTITUTE(TEXT(Interview_Name__r.OpenDate__c), "-", "/") & " " & TEXT( HOUR(Interview_Name__r.StartTime__c)) & ":" & IF(MINUTE(Interview_Name__r.StartTime__c) < 10, "0" & TEXT(MINUTE(Interview_Name__r.StartTime__c)), TEXT(MINUTE(Interview_Name__r.StartTime__c))) & "～")
CustomField.label: 登録前研修日
